ABOUT / PROFILE

P700 / PHOTOGRAPHER / BERLIN

MARCUS HARTELT
BERLIN-BASED PHOTOGRAPHER

Marcus Hartelt is a Berlin-based photographer working across fashion, editorial, runway, lifestyle and events. His work documents looks, atmosphere and key moments — shot on both digital and film.

Available for commissions worldwide, with selected projects covering runway shows, campaigns and editorial stories.
